summary: Tested RBAC, Admin User Management, Storage Settings, and Entity Details features. Fixed critical syntax error in models.py and added missing mutations/handlers in AdminSettings.jsx. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend Admin Settings page loads correctly with Storage and User Management sections.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed models.py syntax error: SystemSettingsResponse class was empty, causing IndentationError
Added missing mutations in AdminSettings.jsx: updateStorageMutation, createUserMutation, inviteUserMutation, updateUserRoleMutation, grantAccessMutation, revokeEntityAccessMutation
Added missing handler functions: handleSaveStorage, handleSaveBaseUrl, handleCreateUser, handleInviteUser, handleGrantAccess
seed_data_creation: Created test users with TEST_RBAC_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC and storage features fully tested. Admin Settings page at /admin/settings has Storage (MinIO) config and User Management sections. All backend APIs working: /api/settings/storage, /api/admin/users, /api/admin/users/{id}/entity-access, /api/admin/entities. Document upload returns 503 when storage not configured (expected behavior).

features_tested.Storage Settings GET: PASS - Admin can retrieve storage config
features_tested.Storage Settings PUT: PASS - Admin can update storage config
features_tested.Admin User List: PASS - Admin can list all users
features_tested.Admin User Create: PASS - Admin can create users with roles
features_tested.Admin User Role Update: PASS - Admin can change user roles
features_tested.Entity Access Grant: PASS - Admin can grant entity access
features_tested.Entity Access List: PASS - Admin can list user's entity access
features_tested.Entity Access Revoke: PASS - Admin can revoke entity access
features_tested.RBAC Entity List: PASS - Users can see granted entities
features_tested.RBAC Entity Access: PASS - Users can access granted entities
features_tested.Document Upload 503: PASS - Returns 503 when storage not configured
features_tested.Admin Settings UI: PASS - Page loads with Storage and User Management sections

bugs_fixed.issue: SystemSettingsResponse class was empty causing IndentationError
bugs_fixed.fix: Added ai_enabled, default_llm_provider, default_model fields to SystemSettingsResponse

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing mutations and handlers for storage, user management, and entity access
bugs_fixed.fix: Added updateStorageMutation, createUserMutation, inviteUserMutation, updateUserRoleMutation, grantAccessMutation, revokeEntityAccessMutation and corresponding handler functions
